columns.name: date
columns.description: Calendar date (daily frequency, sorted ascending). Derived from YEAR + DOY columns in NASA POWER CSV.

columns.name: T2M
columns.description: Daily mean 2-metre air temperature.

columns.name: T2M_MIN
columns.description: Daily minimum 2-metre air temperature. Primary predictor in SMRA models (R² 0.82–0.87).

columns.name: T2M_MAX
columns.description: Daily maximum 2-metre air temperature.

columns.name: RH2M
columns.description: Daily mean relative humidity at 2 metres.

columns.name: PRECTOTCORR
columns.description: Daily bias-corrected precipitation.

columns.name: T2M_roll3
columns.description: 3-day rolling mean of T2M (past data only, closed-right window ending at t).

columns.name: T2M_roll5
columns.description: 5-day rolling mean of T2M.

columns.name: T2M_roll7
columns.description: 7-day rolling mean of T2M. Used in env_interaction_score.

columns.name: T2M_roll14
columns.description: 14-day rolling mean of T2M. Primary accumulation window (domain-validated).

columns.name: T2M_roll28
columns.description: 28-day rolling mean of T2M. Captures long-term monsoon buildup trend.

columns.name: T2M_MIN_roll3
columns.description: 3-day rolling mean of T2M_MIN.

columns.name: T2M_MIN_roll7
columns.description: 7-day rolling mean of T2M_MIN.

columns.name: T2M_MIN_roll14
columns.description: 14-day rolling mean of T2M_MIN. Smoothed version of the primary SMRA predictor.

columns.name: RH2M_roll3
columns.description: 3-day rolling mean of RH2M.

columns.name: RH2M_roll5
columns.description: 5-day rolling mean of RH2M.

columns.name: RH2M_roll7
columns.description: 7-day rolling mean of RH2M. Used in env_interaction_score and early warning rules.

columns.name: RH2M_roll14
columns.description: 14-day rolling mean of RH2M. Primary humidity accumulation indicator.

columns.name: RH2M_roll28
columns.description: 28-day rolling mean of RH2M. Long-term monsoon humidity trend.

columns.name: PREC_sum3
columns.description: 3-day rolling sum of PRECTOTCORR.

columns.name: PREC_sum5
columns.description: 5-day rolling sum of PRECTOTCORR.

columns.name: PREC_sum7
columns.description: 7-day rolling sum of PRECTOTCORR. Used in env_interaction_score.

columns.name: PREC_sum14
columns.description: 14-day rolling sum of PRECTOTCORR. Base for rainfall_accumulation_14d.

columns.name: PREC_sum28
columns.description: 28-day rolling sum of PRECTOTCORR. Captures full monsoon rainfall load.

columns.name: T2M_MIN_lag15
columns.description: T2M_MIN value 15 days ago. PRIMARY LAG FEATURE — SMRA validated R² 0.82–0.87. Negatively correlated with current-day disease incidence.

columns.name: T2M_lag15
columns.description: T2M value 15 days ago.

columns.name: RH2M_lag15
columns.description: RH2M value 15 days ago. Secondary SMRA predictor.

columns.name: PREC_lag15
columns.description: PRECTOTCORR value 15 days ago.

columns.name: T2M_MIN_lag7
columns.description: T2M_MIN value 7 days ago. Short-term lag for faster signal detection.

columns.name: RH2M_lag7
columns.description: RH2M value 7 days ago.

columns.name: T2M_MIN_lag28
columns.description: T2M_MIN value 28 days ago. Long-term pre-monsoon baseline signal.

columns.name: month
columns.description: Calendar month (1–12). Explicit seasonality signal for the model.

columns.name: day_of_year
columns.description: Day of year (1–366). Continuous intra-annual seasonality encoding.

columns.name: monsoon_flag
columns.description: 1 if month is in [6,7,8,9,10] (monsoon season), else 0. Hard seasonal gate aligned with red rot outbreak biology.

columns.name: temperature_suitability_flag
columns.description: 1 if 29 <= T2M <= 33 (optimum pathogen growth range), else 0.

columns.name: temp_suitable_days_14d
columns.description: Count of days in the past 14 days where temperature_suitability_flag == 1.

columns.name: humidity_streak_days
columns.description: Consecutive days (up to t) where RH2M >= 82 %. Resets to 0 on any dry day. Captures sustained humidity accumulation.

columns.name: rainfall_streak_days
columns.description: Consecutive days (up to t) where PRECTOTCORR > 5 mm. Captures continuous rain-splash dispersal risk.

columns.name: rainfall_accumulation_14d
columns.description: Alias of PREC_sum14. Explicit 14-day rainfall accumulation signal. Domain-validated primary rainfall feature for outbreak prediction.

columns.name: env_interaction_score
columns.description: Composite environmental interaction score (0–3). Each past-7-day condition contributes 1 point: (RH2M_roll7 >= 82) + (T2M_roll7 in [29,33]) + (PREC_sum7 >= 15). Uses ONLY past rolling data (no leakage). Score of 3 = all risk conditions simultaneously met.

columns.name: outbreak_risk
columns.description: Binary outbreak risk label for the future window t+3 to t+7. Label=1 if at least 2 of 3 conditions are met over the 5-day future window: (1) mean T2M in [29,33], (2) mean RH2M >= 82, (3) sum PRECTOTCORR >= 20 mm. Strictly leakage-free.

leakage_guarantee.label_alignment: shift(-k) used ONLY for label construction, never in features

drop_rules.reason: First 28 rows lack sufficient rolling history (28-day window); last 7 rows have no valid future label window.

model_training_notes.scaler_rule: Fit on train split only; apply to validation and test
